original_statement: what is the combined point score of the american drivers?
mutated_statement: what is the combined point score of the domestic participants who must be counted and not counted at the same time?
mutation_analysis: [Entity replacement] + [Role generalization] + [Addition of contradictory qualifier]: "american" → "domestic" (specific nationality → ambiguous/local) | "drivers" → "participants" (specific role → generalized group) | added "who must be counted and not counted at the same time" (introduces logical contradiction/ambiguity) (what is the combined point score of the american drivers? → what is the combined point score of the domestic participants who must be counted and not counted at the same time?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 - 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中的 judge_thought 与 critique 可识别关键信息：(1) 多次 judge_thought 明确指出“the question is ambiguous and cannot be answered”“the phrase ‘must be counted and not counted at the same time’ is self-contradictory”，并反复强调预测答案为空，无法验证；(2) 多次 critique 指出使用了不被允许的 simple_query()，且没有使用许可的表操作函数，表明代理在执行层并未给出实质结果。具体表现与行为特征：代理在面对矛盾时没有尝试向用户澄清或分步折中处理，而是多次在内部判定该问题因矛盾与缺失信息不可解，给出逻辑上的不可答解释（说明数据中无“domestic/国籍”字段，矛盾条件无可计算定义），同时其执行链实际未产出答案（Prediction Answer 为空），并曾在评审性注释中尝试将“domestic”解释为“American”以估算（18 分），但未以正式回答提交。归类理由：代理并未尝试通过折中行动去满足互斥条件，而是通过基于数据与逻辑的论证说明该指令在当前上下文下不可成立或不可回答，属于用逻辑解释来合理化矛盾指令的典型行为。
